widgets_values:
LAB flux-to-ltx pipeline (single pod)

Flow: text → FLUX.2 Klein NVFP4 image → LTX-2.3 I2V + audio

Defaults: LAB_FLUX_TIER=fast, LAB_LTX_TIER=balanced
Memory: 90Gi request to keep both model families resident on GB10

1. Ensure weights: download-flux --tier fast && download-ltx --tier balanced
2. Load Flux T2I then LTX I2V+audio graph (or merge in UI)
3. Keep models loaded; avoid unloading between stages

Start: bazelisk run //:manage -- start-flux-to-ltx
